title: daphne cneorum var. striata
intro: Daphne cneorum var. striata, also known as the striped daphne, is a variety of Daphne cneorum, a flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Daphne cneorum var. striata has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Daphne cneorum var. striata include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
